zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Burrell於1555年1月11日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比時，她的父親Keith Burrell26歲，母親Sally Rice15歲。她於大約1562年與Thomas Root在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1610年9月7日在她的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾卡素 阿什比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Burrell于1555年1月11日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比时，她的父亲Keith Burrell26岁，母亲Sally Rice15岁。她于大约1562年与Thomas Root在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1610年9月7日在她的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾卡素 阿什比。

nameMeanings.name: Burrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English, Old French burel, borel (also birel) ‘reddish brown’, referring perhaps to complexion or hair color. This was occasionally used by Normans as a personal name, perhaps a nickname substituted for the personal name. The word also denoted a coarse woollen cloth of this color, so the surname may sometimes refer to dress, or it may be a nickname for a maker of the cloth, a bureller.
habitational name from Burwell in Lincolnshire, see   Burwell  .

variants.name: Borell
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Burrell  . This surname has now died out in Britain.

variants.name: Burrill
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Burrell  .
History: George Burrill was one of the early settlers at Lynn, MA, in 1638, and the founder of a prominent family in colonial MA. He is believed to have come from Boston in Lincolnshire, England.

variants.name: Borrell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Angel, Osvaldo, Alejandro, Alvaro, Blanca, Carlos, Enrique, Francisco, Jose Ramon, Julio, Luis, Manuel.

variants.name: Burwell
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and Yorkshire): habitational name from a place called Burwell, of which there are examples in Cambridgeshire and Lincolnshire, named with Old English burh ‘fort’ + wella ‘spring’.

variants.name: Birrell
meanings: Scottish (Fife) and English: variant of   Burrell  .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Burrell was born on 11 January 1555, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Keith Burrell, was 26 and her mother, Sally Rice, was 15. She married Thomas Root about 1562, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 7 September 1610, in her hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Castle Ashby, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Burrell est née le 11 janvier 1555, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Keith Burrell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sally Rice, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Root environ 1562, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 septembre 1610, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Castle Ashby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Burrell am 11. Januar 1555 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Keith Burrell 26 und ihre Mutter Sally Rice 15. Sie hat um 1562 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England Thomas Root geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. September 1610 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Castle Ashby, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Burrell è nata il il 11 gennaio 1555 nel Badby, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Keith Burrell, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Sally Rice, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Root circa 1562, nel Badby, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Ann Burrellが1555年1月11日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーで生まれた時，父Keith Burrellは26歳，母Sally Riceは15歳であった。約1562年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーでThomas Rootと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1610年9月7日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアカストル アシュビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Burrell(이)가 1555년 1월 11일 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Keith Burrell(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sally Rice(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1562년 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 Thomas Root(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1610년 9월 7일 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 카스틀 애스h비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Burrell nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1555, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Keith Burrell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sally Rice, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Root aproximadamente 1562, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1610, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Castle Ashby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Burrell родилась 11 января 1555 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Keith Burrell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sally Rice, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Root около 1562 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 7 сентября 1610 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности кастл ашби, нортамптоншир, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Root aproximadamente 1562, en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1610, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Castle Ashby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
